mvv.mission: To deliver high-quality construction and engineering solutions at fair and competitive prices through professionalism, innovation, safety, and efficient project execution.
mvv.vision: To become a leading and trusted construction and real estate development company in East Africa, recognized for excellence, integrity, and sustainable infrastructure development.
mvv.values: Integrity in every decision. Precision in every pour. Partnership with every client. Safety for every worker. These are not policies — they are who we are.

items.title: ISO 9001:2015
items.desc: Quality Management System ensuring consistent, high-standard delivery.

items.title: ISO 14001 — Environment
items.desc: Environmental Management System ensuring minimal ecological impact.

items.title: Uganda National Roads Authority
items.desc: Certified contractor for UNRA infrastructure projects.

items.title: Uganda Registration of Engineers
items.desc: Full registration with URE, maintaining professional engineering standards.

items.title: Multi-National Operating Licences
items.desc: Fully licensed and compliant in Uganda, South Sudan, Ethiopia and Eritrea.

index.heroSub: A multinational civil engineering company headquartered in Kampala, Uganda, with operations across five African nations.
index.aboutText: Since 2007, Agunta Construction Ltd has delivered landmark projects across East and West Africa. From high-rise apartments in Kampala to military cantonments and telecom infrastructure — we combine engineering excellence with African expertise.

about.heroSub: A story of precision, commitment and lasting impact across five nations.
about.storyText: Agunta Construction Ltd was founded in Kampala, Uganda in 2007 with a vision to deliver world-class construction services across Africa. Over 17 years we have grown from a local contractor to a multinational engineering firm operating in Uganda, South Sudan, Ethiopia, Eritrea and Ghana.
about.visionText: To be the leading construction and engineering company in Africa, known for quality, innovation and integrity.
about.missionText: To deliver exceptional construction services that meet international standards while creating lasting value for our clients and communities across Africa.

contact.heroSub: Whether you have a project in mind or a question about our services — our team responds within 24 hours.
